translatedData.content:
In the crypto space, making a steady 200-300U daily isn't as tough as you think.

One of my buddies in the group used to be a total noob, chasing pumps and dumps, and lost 5000U in three months. Then he switched up his game: instead of staring at the 1-minute charts and scanning news, he focuses on one thing—every morning at 9 AM, he opens up the 15-minute candlestick chart and keeps an eye on ETH.

His rules are so simple it’s almost embarrassing to share: if the 15-minute candlestick breaks above the previous high, he places a long; if it drops below the previous low, he goes short. He sets his stop-loss just outside the previous high or low, and his take-profit is 1.5 times the stop-loss. For example, if he sets a stop-loss at 10 points, he targets a take-profit at 15 points.

He trades a maximum of three times a day and then shuts down. If he’s right, he gains 15 points; if he’s wrong, he loses 10 points. His win rate doesn’t have to be sky-high; even with two losses out of three trades, he nets a solid 25 points. Each point on ETH is about 1U (based on a 100U position), so 25 points equals 25U. He’s gradually increased his position size, and now he consistently makes 200-300U daily.
When you ask him what his secret is, he simply says: “There’s no secret. Just mechanical execution.”

Why does this method work reliably? Because the market is in consolidation 80% of the time, these small breakout trades naturally have a win rate above 50%. Plus, with a risk-reward ratio of 1.5:1, over the long haul, the expected value is positive. No need to predict market movements or stay glued to your screen until dawn; just control your hands and stick to this specific strategy. $BTC 

Many fail to make money not because their methods are flawed, but because they learn one strategy today, switch to another indicator tomorrow, and then chase the latest hype the next day. Switching back and forth, they never master any single approach. You’re better off honing this one setup for three months, only executing those few trades daily, and at the end of the month, tallying up—chances are you'll be in the green.

Making a steady 200-300U in crypto isn't really that hard. What’s tough is being willing to ditch all those flashy ideas and go back to the most basic, mundane execution. $ETH 

Follow Kun Ge; no bragging, no pie-in-the-sky promises, just sharing real experiences that can help you survive in the market. #BTC #ETH #bill #UB #zec

币圈每天稳赚200-300U，没你想的那么难

我群里一个兄弟，之前也是韭菜，追涨杀跌，三个月亏了5000U。后来他换了个玩法：不看1分钟、不看消息，只做一件事——每天早上9点，打开15分钟K线图，盯着ETH。

他的规则简单到不好意思说：如果15分钟K线突破前一根的高点，就挂一个多单；跌破前一根的低点，就挂一个空单。止损就放前一根的高低点外面一点点，止盈是止损的1.5倍。比如止损10个点，止盈就设15个点。

一天最多做三单，做完关机。对了赚15点，错了亏10点。胜率不用高，对三次错两次，净赚25点。ETH一个点大概1U（按100U开单算），25点就是25U。他把仓位慢慢加大，现在每天稳稳200-300U。
你问他有什么技术？他说：“没有。就是机械执行。”

为什么这个方法能稳？因为市场80%的时间在震荡，这种小突破追单的胜率天生就在50%以上，再加上1.5:1的盈亏比，长期做下来数学期望是正的。不需要预测行情，不需要盯盘到凌晨，只需要你管住手，只做这一种形态。$BTC 

很多人赚不到钱，不是因为方法不行，是因为今天学这个战法，明天换那个指标，后天又追热点。换来换去，哪样都没练透。你不如把这一个形态练上三个月，每天只做这几单，月底算账，大概率是红的。

币圈每天稳赚200-300U，真的没那么难。难的是你愿不愿意放弃那些花里胡哨的想法，回到最笨、最枯燥的执行。$ETH

Are you getting wrecked in contracts every day and still having a blast? Because you have no idea what you're really playing with.

You think you’re trading? Nah, you’re just handing money over to the exchange, fueling the whales, and being background noise for the big players. $BTC 

You get wrecked once, and you say it’s just bad luck. Wrecked twice, and you blame the market for being crazy. Wrecked three times, and you start questioning your life choices. But you never ask yourself: what does that 20x or 50x leverage really mean?

If you open a 20x position with 1000U, you’re effectively borrowing 19000U. If ETH dips 5%, you’re out. You didn’t even get the direction wrong; it just had a little retracement, and your funds go to zero. Is this trading? This is gambling.

What’s scarier is that you don’t even understand the rules. No stop loss, no position control, wanting to add to a position when you're in profit, and holding onto a losing position. You think you’re a trading god, but the market sees you as an ATM.

So how do you actually trade contracts?

In a nutshell: use money you can afford to lose, to gamble on risks you can afford to take. Keep leverage below 5x, limit individual losses to no more than 2% of your total funds, and always set a stop loss when you open a position. Treat this like a side hustle, making a little bit every day, and stop dreaming about getting rich overnight.

Can’t do that? Then don’t blame the wrecks. The market doesn’t owe you anything; you’re the one handing it the knife.

translatedData.content:
When you see the lineup, you know there’s a low probability of any real big results coming out of it, and instead, future disagreements will likely intensify.

Both sides exchange some pleasantries, the blonde guy leads a lavish delegation, and they’re really putting on a show. On the surface, they're talking cooperation and stability, but privately, they probably think the other side is a total clown. A lot of the time, the world feels like one huge amateur theater troupe, but the more these theatrics, the more it indicates both sides want to avoid a real meltdown.

I suddenly remember back in middle school, when the new kids in grades 7 and 8 would challenge the established crew in grade 9. One evening study session, the entire playground was packed with two basketball courts filled with two to three thousand people, the boys' dorm beds nearly stripped bare, all sorts of knives and bats, teachers, girls, and cafeteria ladies were all on the sidelines watching, the atmosphere was electric. But in the end, nothing happened.

That night, everyone knew there wouldn't be a fight, nor any substantial changes; instead, both sides had a clearer understanding of their future paths and disagreements.

Even the bathrooms, the east and west corridors of the teaching building, and sports facilities were implicitly divided that night.

International politics is often the same way. The most dangerous phase in the game of great powers isn’t when the shouting is loudest, but when one side feels they can keep pushing while the other feels they have nowhere left to retreat.

Now it’s looking more and more like it can be competitive, it can be mutually disgusting, they can throw verbal jabs every day, but the core red lines are becoming clearer. Trade can be negotiated, markets can interact, AI can compete, but energy, chips, military, and supply chains are all being implicitly divided.

When I see the lineup, I feel like the talks will be a bust, with big headlines, a strong on-site atmosphere, and everything in place, but in the end, both sides just end up drawing red lines.

content:
看到名单时，就知道后续大概率谈不出什么真正的大结果，反而未来分歧会越来越严重。

双方互相寒暄几句，黄毛带着豪华访问团，阵势拉满，气场也做足了。台面上谈合作、谈稳定，私下可能都觉得对方是Sb。世界很多时候就是这样一个巨大的草台班子，但越是这种场面，反而越说明双方不想真正失控。

突然想起读初中时，初一、初二的新晋势力，和初三的老牌势力约架。某个晚自习，整个操场两个篮球场两三千人密密麻麻全是人，男生宿舍床板几乎被拆空，各种砍刀棍棒、老师、女生、食堂大妈全在外围围观，气氛拉满。但最后屁事没有发生。

那一晚大家心里都清楚不可能打起来，也不会有任何实质性的改变，反而双方未来的路线和分歧更加清晰。

甚至连卫生间、教学楼东西走廊、运动设施，都在那一晚被默认划开。

国际政治很多时候也是一样。大国博弈最危险的阶段，往往不是天天喊得最凶的时候，而是一方还觉得能继续压，另一方却已经觉得退无可退的时候。

现在反而越来越像，可以竞争，可以互相恶心，
可以天天嘴炮，但核心红线开始越来越清晰。贸易能谈，市场能接触，AI能竞争，但能源、芯片、军事、供应链这些东西，双方都在默认划区。

看到名单时就感觉会谈个寂寞，新闻标题很大，现场阵势很强，气氛也很到位，最后还是双方互划红线。

#ETH  trading crypto for 12 years, made 1.1 small targets, looking to change my fate, I definitely need to give the crypto scene a shot. If you can't make bank in this space, then the average Joe won't have a chance in their lifetime. Last month, I had the fortune of sharing some tea with a crypto big shot and we talked about the wild market.
His words really hit home.
Turns out, he once got wrecked on contracts in three days, losing as much as 50 million. That experience was undoubtedly a profound lesson for him.
Looking back at my own crypto journey, it's been a rollercoaster ride. I started with 50k, rode the bull market to make tens of millions; now I'm at 1.1 small targets.
My trading strategy isn't complicated but incredibly effective. In just one year, I grew my assets to 8 figures. I've maintained over a 90% win rate, thanks to my patience and sharp judgment.
If you're set on trading crypto for a living, these five golden rules are worth holding onto and memorizing.

First: Understand stop-loss and take-profit. We're buying and selling crypto to trade, to speculate, not to hold forever! When you're in the green, you think about making more, but when you're in the red, you're reluctant to sell. That mindset is definitely not the way to go. If your position starts going south, you need to cut your losses fast.

Second: Stop always trying to buy low and sell high. The market will only go lower and higher. — We normal folks can't play that game, so don’t chase after those so-called highs and lows too much.

Third: Volume and price need to match perfectly. For those positions that rise without volume or hit new highs without volume, we need to be cautious. It could signal that the whales can't offload their bags, leading to a potential exhaustion of the uptrend — don’t chase it, it's better to miss out than to make the wrong move.

Fourth: Be quick on the uptake. When information comes out, we need to immediately identify the sectors and companies that will benefit. If you can’t keep up with the first tier, then we need to act on the second tier, which can also yield significant gains.

Fifth: The biggest opportunity in the market often comes from a crash, as it usually brings about even bigger chances. If you can't overcome human weaknesses, you'll never make your first five million.

#ETH 炒币12年，赚了1.1个小目标，想要改变命运，一定要尝试一下币圈，如果在这个圈子你都不能发财，普通人这辈子就没有机会了，上个月我有幸与币圈的一位大佬共饮香茗，畅谈币市风云。
他的一番话，让我深感震撼。
原来，他曾因三天内做合约而爆仓，亏损高达5000万元。这段经历，对他而言，无疑是一次深刻的教训。
回顾我自己在币圈的历程，也是跌宕起伏。从最初的5w入市，到赶上牛市狂赚千万；到目前的1.1个小目标。
我的炒币方法并不复杂，却异常实用。仅用一年时间，我便将资产炒到了8位数。我一直保持着90%以上的胜率，这得益于我的耐心与精准的判断。
如果你决定一辈子炒币以此为生，这五大宝典建议收藏反复牢记。

第一点：那就是要懂得止损止盈。我们买卖币是为了交易，是为了炒作，而不是永远的拿着！当你赚钱的时候，想的是赚更多，亏损的时候，你又不愿意把它卖掉，这种想法是肯定不可取的。当仓位的走势走错的时候，那就需要果断卖出。

第二点：不要总想着低点买人、高点卖出。因为市场只会有更低的点和更高的点。—我们普通人做不到这种机制，所以不要过于去追求所谓的高低。

第三点：量和价要配合完美。对于那些上涨无量或者是说创新高无量的一些仓—位，我们一定要警惕。它很有可能是一种主力出不了货上涨衰竭的一种信号，千万不要去追，宁愿错过也不能够做错。

第四点：反应要快。当一个信息出现的时候，我们要马上找到他利好的板块和公司都有哪一些。如果第一梯队你跟不上，那么我们就要及时的去做，第二个梯队同样也会有不小的收获。

第五点：市场最大的利好就是暴跌，因为暴跌之后往往会迎来很多更大的机会。如果你不能克服人性的弱点，你就永远赚不到你人生中的第一个五百万。

Every time there's a dip, some folks scream that the bull run is over. Every time there's a spike, others say they're back in the green. Looking back, the real winners aren't the loudest ones; they're the ones who stay calm when the market drops, keep their heads when it rises, know when to go short, and when to pull the trigger. #币圈生存法则 

I used to be one of those who shouted. When prices rose, I’d yell that a bull market was here, and when they fell, I’d say a bear market was upon us. After shouting, losses still came. I later discovered that those who scream the loudest often have less than impressive accounts. The ones with solid portfolios don’t talk much. It’s not that they're aloof; they understand that market movements have nothing to do with what you say, but everything to do with what you do. Shouting too much can cloud your judgment. When you’re bullish, you’ll find reasons to be bullish; when you’re bearish, you’ll find excuses to be bearish. You’re not analyzing the market; you’re just rationalizing your own position.

Those who don’t shout have no bias, and without bias, they can see clearly. They don’t get carried away when prices rise because they know a correction is coming. They don’t panic when prices drop because they expect a rebound. It’s not just a good mindset; it’s an understanding of how the market operates. Price fluctuations are normal; what’s not normal is your emotional response. When you keep your emotions in check, the market seems normal.

Going short isn’t about avoiding profits; it’s about waiting for the right moment. Jumping in prematurely won’t just yield no profits; it could lead to losses. Being in cash isn’t giving up; it’s saving your ammo for when it counts. Many people struggle with sitting in cash, thinking their money is being wasted. In reality, when you act recklessly, you’re not just wasting money; you’re giving it away. When you aren’t giving it away, that’s when you’re making profits.

When it’s time to act, you act—not because you’re itching to, but because the signals are there. Hesitating when the signals arrive means missing out, and missing out means losing. Taking action isn’t impulsive; it’s about executing a plan. You’ve been waiting for this signal, so when it arrives, what are you waiting for?

我以前也喜欢喊。涨了喊牛市来了，跌了喊熊市来了，喊完该亏还是亏。后来发现，那些喊得凶的人，账户都不怎么样。真正账户好看的人，不怎么说话。不是他们高冷，是他们知道，行情怎么走跟你怎么说没关系，跟你怎么做才有关系。喊多了还会影响自己的判断。你喊多的时候会找理由看多，喊空的时候会找理由看空。你不是在分析行情，是在为自己的立场找借口。

不喊的人没有立场，没有立场才能看得清。涨了不飘，因为知道会回调。跌了不慌，因为知道会反弹。他不是心态好，是他知道市场就是这样。涨跌都是正常的，不正常的是你的情绪。你把情绪放平了，市场就正常了。

该空仓时空仓，不是因为不想赚钱，是因为没到该赚的时候。没到的时候进去，赚不到不说，还会亏。空仓不是放弃，是把子弹留到该打的时候。很多人不会空仓，觉得钱放着就是浪费。其实你乱做的时候，钱不是浪费，是送。不送的时候，就是赚。

该出手时出手，不是因为手痒，是因为信号到了。信号到了不敢做，就是犹豫。犹豫就是错过，错过就是亏。出手不是冲动，是执行。你等了好久，等的就是这个信号。信号来了不敢做，那你等什么？

跌了不慌，涨了不飘，该空仓空仓，该出手出手。这四句话做到了，你的账户不会差。做不到，喊再多也没用。

Post Title: Is Solana ($SOL) Gearing Up for a $400 Breakout? | May 2026 Update
Body:
The "Ethereum Killer" narrative is long gone—Solana ($SOL) has carved out its own kingdom. As of today, May 15, we are seeing SOL holding steady around the $346 mark, showing incredible resilience even as the broader market consolidates.
Why I’m Watching $SOL Right Now:
Institutional Momentum: With the recent launch of specialized Solana-focused funds (like the FSOL dividend announcement), big money is no longer just "watching" Solana; they are moving in.
The "May Trend": Historically, May has been a volatile month for SOL. However, in 2024 and 2025, we saw positive monthly returns. Currently, SOL is up roughly 15% for May 2026, defying its old "May Dip" reputation.  
Ecosystem Strength: From AI-integrated dApps to ultra-low transaction fees, the developer activity on Solana is outperforming almost every other Layer 1.
Technical Outlook 📈
Support: Strong support is holding at $340.
Resistance: If we break the $360 barrier with high volume, the path toward its all-time highs looks very clear.
Freshers' Tip: If you're new to trading, Solana is one of the best coins to start with because of its high liquidity and the ability to move assets for pennies.
My Strategy: I am currently "Dollar Cost Averaging" (DCA) at these levels. The ecosystem growth is too strong to ignore.
What do you think? Will SOL hit $400 before June, or are we due for a correction? Let me know in the comments! 👇
